display.purpose: Slide titles on presentation canvases only.

body.purpose: UI copy, descriptions, slide body text.

mono.purpose: Code blocks in slides, technical content.

shadows.name: sm
shadows.purpose: Resting state for cards and containers.

shadows.name: 2xl
shadows.purpose: Slide preview canvas in the editor.

motion.name: duration-slide
motion.purpose: Slide and zoom transitions on dialog content.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action per viewport. Obsidian background, white text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: oklch(0.2050 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.1450 0 0); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(4, 71, 255, 0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with a border stroke.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; height: 2.25rem; padding: 0.5rem 1rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); border-radius: 0.625rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: oklch(0.9700 0 0); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(4, 71, 255, 0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Container for presentation items on the dashboard. White background, 1rem radius, shadow at rest.
components.html:
My Presentation

Created 7/7/2026
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1.5rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10), 0 1px 2px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: grid; grid-template-rows: auto auto; align-items: start; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 1.5rem; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.5560 0 0); } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0 1.5rem; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text field with Chalk border and Signal Blue focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: flex; height: 2.25rem; width: 100%; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; border: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); border-radius: 0.625rem; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.5560 0 0); } .ds-input:focus { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(4, 71, 255, 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: oklch(0.5770 0.2450 27.3250); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(216, 60, 60, 0.2); }

components.name: Navigation (Sidebar)
components.description: Left sidebar with active state using Obsidian background. Off-white container.
components.html:
MarkDeck

DashboardShared
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 220px; min-height: 100vh; padding: 1rem; background: oklch(0.9850 0 0); border-right: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-sidebar-brand { padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); } .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.25rem; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.9700 0 0); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.2050 0 0); color: oklch(1 0 0); } .ds-nav-item-active:hover { background: oklch(0.1450 0 0); }

components.name: Dialog
components.description: Modal overlay with 50% black backdrop. Content panel centered with fade-in animation.
components.html:
Share Presentation

Invite collaborators via email.
components.css: .ds-dialog-overlay { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); animation: ds-fade-in 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-dialog-panel { position: relative; width: 100%; max-width: 32rem; margin: 1rem; background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px 0px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10), 0 4px 6px -1px hsl(0 0% 0% / 0.10); animation: ds-zoom-in 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog-header { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-dialog-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1; } .ds-dialog-body { margin-bottom: 1rem; } .ds-dialog-description { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.5560 0 0); } .ds-dialog-footer { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 0.5rem; } .ds-dialog-close { position: absolute; top: 1rem; right: 1rem; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.5rem; height: 1.5rem; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); opacity: 0.7; background: none; border: none; border-radius: 0.25rem; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 150ms; } .ds-dialog-close:hover { opacity: 1; } @keyframes ds-fade-in { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } } @keyframes ds-zoom-in { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }

components.name: Badge / Chip
components.description: Small metadata label with outline style. Used on presentation cards for ownership badges.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Inter', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: oklch(0.1450 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.9220 0 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.25; }

narrative.overview:
MarkDeck is a quiet, undistracted workspace for turning notes into slides. Like a well-kept reading room in a university library, it prioritizes function over ornament. The interface recedes so the content leads.

The visual system is near-achromatic — the neutral ramp is tinted toward amber at very low chroma (oklch hue ~60°, chroma 0.003–0.015) for subconscious warmth, like warm lamplight on cream paper. Full chromatic range lives inside slide themes (26 distinct palettes applied per-presentation). The chrome around the content (sidebar, header, dashboard) carries only this subtle warm tint, never a theme color.

This system explicitly rejects the drag-and-drop design canvas aesthetic (Canva, et al.). There are no color pickers, no element selectors, no property panels. The editor is a textarea and a live preview.
keyCharacteristics: Near-achromatic chrome with warm-tinted neutral ramp, chromatic slide canvases
1rem (16px) radius on cards and dialogs — gently rounded, not pill-like
Flat surfaces with tonal layering for depth; shadows reserved for interactive hover states and dialog overlays
Serif display font for slide titles, sans body for UI — content is editorial, chrome is utilitarian

rules.name: The Chromatic Firewall Rule
rules.body: The app chrome (sidebar, header, dashboard, editor shell) uses only the neutral ramp. All color lives inside slide themes, applied per-presentation via data-theme. No UI element outside the slide canvas may carry a theme color.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state — button hover, dialog open, card hover. If an element doesn't change state, it doesn't cast a shadow.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutral-ramp colors are tinted toward amber (oklch hue ~60°) at very low chroma (0.003–0.015). This provides subconscious warmth without reading as 'colored.' Avoid pure gray neutrals (0 chroma) in the UI shell — they feel sterile against the warm tint.

dos: Do use the warm-tinted neutral ramp for all app chrome. Color belongs on slide canvases, not in the UI shell.
Do use Obsidian (near-black) as the sole primary button and active nav color. No accent hues in the toolbar.
Do keep one call-to-action per viewport. Secondary actions use outline or ghost variants.
Do rely on tonal layering (White → Off-white → Powder) for depth. Shadows are for interaction feedback only.
Do use Waldenburg for slide titles and Inter for everything else. The serif/sans split is the system's defining personality axis.
Do keep buttons to one of the six defined sizes. Custom sizing breaks the rhythm.
donts: Don't use color from a slide theme anywhere in the app chrome. Not in the sidebar, header, buttons, or navigation.
Don't make MarkDeck feel like Canva — no drag-and-drop canvas, no element selection, no property panels, no visual editor.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe. Use full borders, background tints, or nothing.
Don't apply glassmorphism, gradient text, or side-stripe borders anywhere in the system.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrow text ('ABOUT', 'PROCESS') above every section heading.
Don't render identical card grids with same-sized icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't let text overflow its container. Test heading copy at every breakpoint.
Don't animate with bounce or elastic easing. Use ease-out-quart / quint / expo curves.
Don't ship motion without a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback.
